title: COMPASS HOUSE - 211info
text: COMPASS HOUSE COMPASS HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support services that include advocacy, assistance navigating public services, meals, and help obtaining employment. Offers education assistance through tutoring and navigating educational resources in the community. The Clubhouse Model of rehabilitation is utilized. Membership is voluntary and without time limits. 37 N Ivy Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with a diagnosed mental illness Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Tours: Monday-Friday 8am-3:30pm Meals: Varies call for information Email (541) 973-2840 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 973-2840 Main phone Main phone (541) 973-2840 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Referral from a health care provider -Walk in for a tour or to pick up a referral form -Referral forms are also available through most therapist or case managers -Call if unable to pick up a referral form in person to have one emailed or faxed FEES: None for most services, meals $1.50 per person DOCUMENTS: Referral form and documentation of mental illness AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of 6th and Ivy. From RVTD Station, take Front Street towards 6th. Turn left on 6th and follow to Ivy. Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Mental Health Issues Housing Search Assistance * Mental Health Issues Job Finding Assistance * Mental Health Issues Low Cost Meals * Mental Health Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMPASS HOUSE
